configSchema.title: Apollo
configSchema.description: Connect an Apollo API key to enable optional Ross Index enrichment for companies and founders. The key is stored securely via the connection service.

variants.name: error
variants.message: Something went wrong. The Apollo API key was validated live before saving — a rejected key leaves any prior connection unchanged.

fields.label: API key storage
fields.whenReady: API keys are stored securely via the connection service.
fields.whenNotReady: Configure the connection service first so Apollo API requests can authenticate.

fields.label: Connection
fields.description: Check whether an Apollo API key is configured and validated.

fields.label: Apollo API key
fields.description: Create a key in Apollo. Requires at least a non-Free Apollo plan with People API Search enabled (the Ross Index optimization flow needs that endpoint, which the Free plan does not grant). The key is validated live against Apollo before it is saved. Write-only — the stored value is never shown again.

fields.label: Apollo setup
fields.whenReady: Apollo is connected. The stored API key enables optional Ross Index enrichment for companies and founders. To rotate the key, paste a new one on the Setup tab and click Save connection — the new key is validated live before it replaces the old one. Use Clear connection to remove the stored key.
fields.whenNotReady: Not connected yet. Create a key in Apollo, then paste it into the API key field on the Setup tab and click Save connection. Requires at least a non-Free Apollo plan with People API Search enabled — the Ross Index optimization flow needs that endpoint, which the Free plan does not grant. The key is validated live against Apollo before it is saved and is write-only afterward — the stored value is never shown again.
fields.description: Read-only setup guidance — nothing on this tab is saved.
